Metadata.Title: CVE-2024-36137 affecting package nodejs for versions less than 24.14.1-3
Metadata.Description: CVE-2024-36137 affecting package nodejs for versions less than 24.14.1-3. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package nodejs is earlier than 24.14.1-3, affected by CVE-2024-36137
